center.name: Kissimmee Prairie Preserve State Park
center.summary: Kissimmee Prairie Preserve State Park是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Common ground dove，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The common ground dove (Columbina passerina) is a small bird that inhabits the southern United States, parts of Central America, the Caribbean and northern South America
